expectations.evidence: Does NOT use YAuthPlugin at all. main.ts just creates app with Vue Router (lines 13-19). Instead creates a manual auth.ts with createYAuthClient({ baseURL: '/api/auth' }) — note wrong property name 'baseURL' vs correct 'baseUrl'.

expectations.text: LoginPage uses LoginForm component with onMfaRequired handler
expectations.evidence: Does NOT use the pre-built LoginForm component. Writes an entirely custom login form from scratch with manual HTML/CSS (lines 211-437). The custom useAuth composable has wrong API calls: authClient.login() and authClient.verifyMfa() don't match actual client API (should be client.emailPassword.login() and client.mfa.verify()).

expectations.text: MfaChallenge component is shown when MFA is required during login
expectations.evidence: Does NOT use the pre-built MfaChallenge component. Has custom MFA code input inline in LoginPage.vue. Also guesses at MFA response shape (mfa_token, mfaToken) which doesn't match actual API (pendingSessionId).
Does NOT use the pre-built RegisterForm component. Writes custom registration form from scratch with manual HTML/CSS.

expectations.text: DashboardPage uses useSession or useYAuth to display user info
expectations.evidence: Does NOT use useSession or useYAuth composables from @yackey-labs/yauth-ui-vue. Uses custom useAuth() composable with manually managed state. References fabricated user.mfa_enabled field not present in AuthUser.

expectations.text: Vue Router is configured with routes for login, register, and dashboard
expectations.evidence: Routes correctly configured for login, register, dashboard with redirect (lines 145-168)
